entities.name: Strategy Compounder
entities.context: Analysis system that extracts themes, scores patterns, and generates visualizations from strategic partner sessions

entities.name: Theme clustering
entities.context: Technique using cosine similarity (≥ 0.85) to group related themes and synonyms

entities.name: strategic-partner
entities.context: Command that generates sessions which Strategy Compounder analyzes

entities.name: weekly-strategic-review
entities.context: Command that consumes Strategy Compounder insights

entities.name: Knowledge Write Protection
entities.context: Safety feature ensuring baseline strategy is read-only with human approval required for updates

entities.name: Non-Prescriptive Analysis
entities.context: Principle that analysis describes patterns without dictating decisions - user interprets and decides

entities.name: baseline strategy
entities.context: Reference document read by Strategy Compounder; protected from direct modification

entities.name: Mermaid
entities.context: Used for timeline generation visualization in Strategy Compounder output

entities.name: Exponential decay weighting
entities.context: Scoring technique that weights recent data more heavily

entities.name: Consensus calculation
entities.context: Scoring method measuring agreement across sessions

entities.name: Divergence measurement
entities.context: Scoring method tracking deviation from baseline or norms

relationships.context: Core technique for grouping related themes
Analyzes sessions generated by strategic-partner command
Enforces human approval for any strategy updates
Follows principle of describing without dictating
Weights recent sessions more heavily in scoring
